mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.student_id AS studentId, s.name AS studentName, o.session_id AS sessionId, cs.session_name AS sessionName, o.rank_category AS rankCategory, o.accommodation_type AS accommodationType, o.room_match_status AS roomMatchStatus, o.total_amount AS amount, o.payment_status AS paymentStatus, o.order_status AS orderStatus, o.create_time AS createTime FROM registration_order o LEFT JOIN student s ON o.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN camp_session cs ON o.session_id = cs.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
